# Marrakech Eco Tours

> Licensed Moroccan tour operator offering small-group eco-conscious adventures led by certified Berber guides. Founded in 2010 by the Aitidar family. Based in Marrakech, Morocco.

## About

Marrakech Eco Tours was founded in 2010 by brothers Smail and Mohamed Aitidar, sons of Lahsen Aitidar — one of the first licensed Berber mountain guides in the High Atlas (1980s). All guides hold Moroccan Ministry of Tourism certifications.

Tours depart from Marrakech and Agadir. Group sizes are small (2–15 people). Private and custom tours available. Eco principles and Leave No Trace practices followed on all trips.

Languages: Arabic, Berber (Tachelhit), French, English, Spanish.
Rating: 4.7/5 from 1,000+ travelers.
Phone/WhatsApp: +212 653 936 003

## Tours Offered

- Toubkal Summit Trek (4 days) — climb Jbel Toubkal (4,167m), highest peak in North Africa
- Sahara Desert Tour (3 days) — camel trek, luxury Berber camp, Erg Chebbi dunes, Aït Ben Haddou
- Ourika Valley Day Hike — Setti Fatma waterfalls, Berber villages, natural pools
- Mgoun Massif Traverse — remote high-atlas multi-day trek
- Paradise Valley & Immouzer Waterfalls (from Agadir)
- Souss-Massa National Park Wildlife Tour (from Agadir)
- Marrakech Medina Cultural Tour
- Fes Imperial City Tour
- Essaouira Atlantic Coast Day Tour
- 30+ total tours across trekking, desert, cultural, and day trip categories

## Key Destinations

Atlas Mountains (Toubkal, Mgoun, Ourika, Imlil), Sahara Desert (Merzouga, Erg Chebbi), Marrakech Medina, Fes el-Bali, Chefchaouen, Essaouira, Agadir, Ouzoud Falls, Draa Valley, Aït Ben Haddou (UNESCO)

## Booking

Website: https://marrakechecotours.com
WhatsApp: https://wa.me/212653936003
Email: info@marrakechecotours.com
Free cancellation: 14 days prior to departure
Payment: PayPal deposit to secure booking
